company.what_they_do: StackOne is an AI agent integration infrastructure platform. It connects AI agents to enterprise SaaS systems — providing 410+ pre-built connectors, 20,000+ actions — handling authentication, rate limiting, retries, data shaping, and security so that AI agents can reliably take actions across any external system. Key pillars: (1) Connectivity — supports MCP, A2A, REST, SOAP, OData, proprietary APIs; (2) Execution — 'Falcon' engine handles auth, throttling, retries, declarative YAML connectors in Git; (3) Security — Permissions API normalizing RBAC/scopes, 'Defender' prompt-injection detection (0.88 F1), SOC 2 Type II, GDPR, HIPAA compliant, no-storage-by-default architecture. Also offers an AI Integration Builder (build connectors from a coding assistant prompt). Positioned as purpose-built for AI agents, contrasted with legacy iPaaS tools.
raw_notes: Homepage headline: 'Your agent thinks, StackOne takes action' — framing as agent infrastructure, not just a unified API
Claims #1 agentic semantic tool search with 91.6% first-try accuracy on 'S1 Search Bench' (self-published benchmark)
410+ connectors cited on homepage; other pages cite 310–330+ (homepage appears most current)

Falcon: proprietary next-gen execution engine — declarative YAML connectors in Git, isolated execution contexts, per-provider throttling/queuing/retries, automatic OAuth/token refresh, real-time data shaping and caching, one connector definition exposed via REST, MCP, A2A, and AI SDKs
Permissions API: normalizes RBAC, scopes, ACLs into single model; sub-millisecond permission checks with local caching

Defender: prompt injection detection (OWASP LLM #1 risk), two-tier — pattern matching ~1ms, fine-tuned ML ONNX classifier ~10ms, F1 0.87–0.88; runs in-process, no external API calls, three lines to integrate
Privacy: no customer data stored by default; choose processing region; full audit trail
Compliance: SOC 2 Type II certified, GDPR, HIPAA, CCPA
Use cases highlighted: invoice processing automation, time-off request automation, employee onboarding automation, SLA breach prediction/escalation, month-end accruals/journal entries
Protocols supported: MCP, A2A, REST API, native SDKs for Python and TypeScript; works with OpenAI Agents SDK, LangChain, CrewAI, Pydantic AI, Google ADK, Vercel AI SDK, Anthropic SDK
AI Integration Builder: plugs into coding assistant (Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, GitHub Copilot); researches provider APIs, generates YAML, tests against real API; currently in early access
Series A: $20M (USD) / €17.6M led by GV (Google Ventures), March/April 2025; total funding ~$24M across 3 rounds
Investors: GV (Google Ventures), Workday Ventures, XTX Ventures, Episode 1, Playfair; angel investors include founders of GitHub, Onfido, Hofy
Founded 2023; incorporated in England and Wales (company 14684360); registered office: 2 Communications Road, Newbury, Berkshire, RG19 6AB
Team operates globally across Europe and United States
Notable customers mentioned: Drata (compliance automation), Kinfolk (AI Agents for People Ops), Attensi, Localyze
Building AI developer community including AI Demo Days and open-source contributions
Surpassed 1 billion API calls (as of ~May 2025), 10M+ API calls cited on about page
The 'sandbox@stackone.com' email with org 's1-sandbox' is almost certainly an internal StackOne test/sandbox signup, not a real external prospect
